svg.title: Temple lockup — Rtambhareshvara Mandir / ऋतम्भरेश्वर मंदिर
svg.desc: Lockup for the temple name in both scripts. Wider viewBox (1280 vs the 1080 of the wordmark/bilingual lockups) to accommodate the longest name in the system. ASCII Latin form for legibility on physical signage and donor materials; full Devanagari beneath. Gold rule centered on the lockup axis.
